description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow with a dark, gabled roof and a broad, low profile. The exterior walls are clad in what appears to be wood paneling, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. The front facade features a main entrance with a small overhang and several evenly spaced windows, while the rear side has fewer windows and a more utilitarian look. The roof is punctuated by multiple chimneys and skylights, suggesting a well-ventilated and naturally lit interior. The structure sits on a concrete or stone foundation, surrounded by a neatly maintained grassy yard and paved walkways. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a dark gabled roof, wood-paneled exterior, and multiple chimneys and skylights, set on a grassy plot with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a paved walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated roof, skylights, and a small side entrance with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows, a more solid wall appearance, and visible chimneys on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a secondary entrance, additional skylights, and the continuation of the paved walkway.
